reviews.review_title: It's  cool as The Fist of the NorthStar
reviews.review_description: Best way to trick you to do gym while raging around as Ken from the fist of the north star or doing Bud Spencer action movies. Looking forward to next update

I follow this guys and the story behind the game Is very funny and interesting!
They are still developing It, but the quality Is High!

After almost a year after giving a review for this game I came back to review it again.  The new added material is refreshing and now I understand the weird movement mechanic. 

The game is basically a rouge lite of wavs of enemy’s with rpg stat building using cards. Does get fun and addictive trying to go for more levels. Starts to get boring after a 5-6 levels. But the workout . 

Devs…

I think I see where your going with this but I think you need to market this as a workout game similar to synthriders but boxing….

Either way keep going….

reviews.review_title: Finally the first VR anime fighting game
reviews.review_description: The game is very raw but it's potential it's very awesome!!!

reviews.review_title: I Feel Like A Super Saiya
reviews.review_description:
UltraClash V makes you feel like you are a Super Saiyan in Virtual Reality. This beat em up game lets you punch enemies into oblivion all while dashing around Goku style.

Full Review here:
https://youtu.be/fPoa6OpD2UI

UltrasClash V is a fast pace anime style mod brawler. You will punch enemies into the air, then rush into the air to finish they off, anime style.

The game is based in an anime looking environment, with anime style charters and movies. This is a fast based mob brawler, that will keep you moving and working up a sweat. 

The fighting style is up to you. You can just box the  enemies, or fight them like you are in an anime. I found it really exciting to knock people into the air then slow mode jump into the air and finish them off.

The game was immersive and fun to play. I was entertained and got a workout. Its on App Labs for free to try, if your up to the fight.

Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/E7Ax3d6HnxE
Super nice punch System, i want to see a Kamehameha Attack!!

The prototype has some flaws, but the idea is very unique. If the developers keep working on it it could be a very amazing experience. I want to give 5 stars for the innovative idea and put some trust in the guys behind the game!
This is a very cool game with amazing features, 10/10
It was Ight at first but with the new update it really shows where the game could take off in the future

So I’m not going to mention any bugs that I’ve seen already in the reviews plus this game is in development so yeah I’m sure they know what’s up. Every fix or feature just takes time to implement. With that out of the way; something I did notice that wasn’t said was that the other rooms or portals were locked and the only room was the training room. I can only assume they’re already implemented because they say locked and not under construction or under development. This means that for me anyways there’s a big difficulty curve to beat the first room. I still haven’t been able to beat it and idk how many there are before you do. Also I don’t really know what the charge ability does. I can see it charging but idk if I’m supposed to move my arms from the charging pose to punch or throw my hands forward or what. I feel like that could be a little more clear with an explanation. Overall amazing game with mind bending art. I really like the idea and I can’t wait to see what the devs decide to do next with it!
This is such a fun game I hope a full game release happens soon with a story and I would love to see oculus scoreboard achievements implemented I'm hoping

So I purchased this game and played it and there were a few problems 1. It doesn’t give tutorial so you don’t know what to do 2. Whenever your up in the air your arms get really stretchy and you can’t move them 3. It needs a joystick moving option for people that find it hard to move because when ever you move forward you sometimes move backwards 4. There is a place whenever you spawn and you just fall through the map 4. I don’t even know if there are any different enemy’s or maps because unavailability to move I would consider giving this a higher rating if it was more playable.

developer_response.body: Is a prototype but we are working harldy 360 for nexts update, 1 star is really a bad rating for our on dev product, hope you will try again and enjoy more in the future:) have a nice day!

reviews.review_description: This game have so much potential! Please add kamehameha

The game is good, the problem is  when I'm trying to punch them in the air I go forward and I get stuck in the air and can't move, you can't do much In the game but do the training area and unlock cash and get items, not even the gloves you can get, your cash doesnt even save either, I hope this game can get more features soon.

developer_response.body: For sure we are working very hard to fix those problemes, as you can see in the description this is an early access so this price is only for support the development. If you have any feedback and suggestions would be very appreciated.

reviews.review_description:
The game is still in its infancy, but I can't wait to try the final version.
The movement system is great and the enemies are really fun.
